Phase-65.NAME: Premium Release Candidate Gate
Phase-65.objective: Close the premium frontend and email redesign as a release-candidate gate before tagging a release.
Phase-65.non-goals: Implementing new UI features, changing deploy/install scripts, or promoting stable without live operator validation.

steps.step-1: Run all premium smoke scripts from Phase-55 through Phase-64.
steps.step-2: Run frontend and frontend-admin production builds.
steps.step-3: Run backend email tests for premium Resend templates.
steps.step-4: Capture or record public/auth/user/admin/email screenshots across phone/tablet/desktop and reduced-motion.
steps.step-5: Run XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/runtime guard.
steps.step-6: Document any clean-deploy-only screenshot or live validation gaps.
steps.step-7: Prepare release notes for premium Matrix frontend, responsive adaptation, logo integration, and Resend templates.

Phase-65.acceptance: Premium redesign is ready for a prerelease or stable-release decision based on operator validation.
